## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (security-touching changes prove the invariant)
- [ ] `composer test` passes
- [ ] `composer lint` passes (pint, phpstan level 8, rector)
- [ ] The injection corpus and secrets-never-logged tests are untouched or strengthened
- [ ] Docs updated where behavior changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added under Unreleased
